description_long: This object is a tall, rectangular container with a hinged lid on top and two wheels at the base, resembling a standard outdoor waste or recycling bin. The body is made of durable, molded plastic, with a smooth, slightly glossy finish and reinforced edges for structural integrity. The lid is flat and slightly overhangs the sides, featuring a handle for easy opening and closing. The rear side has two robust wheels attached to an axle, allowing the container to be tilted and rolled for transport. The front and sides are plain, with no visible drawers, handles, or label holders, and the overall color is a deep black. This type of container is commonly found on sidewalks, in alleys, or near garages for waste collection in urban environments.
description: A tall, black, wheeled outdoor container with a hinged lid, commonly used for waste or recycling in urban settings. It features a smooth plastic body, two rear wheels, and a handle on the lid.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, rectangular face of the container with the lid closed and no visible handles or openings.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the container, the overhanging lid, and one of the two wheels at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays both wheels and the axle, as well as the back edge of the lid.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the wheel and the container's smooth, uninterrupted surface.
